name: Matrix — Risk Assessment Grid (5 items)
input: Create a risk assessment matrix for a clinical trial: High Impact + High Probability (Adverse Event), High Impact + Low Probability (Protocol Deviation), Low Impact + High Probability (Missing Data), Low Impact + Low Probability (Equipment Failure).
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: 2x2 risk matrix with impact/probability axes and color-coded quadrants.

data.title: Clinical Trial Risk Assessment Matrix

items.label: Critical Risk
items.description: Adverse events: high impact, high probability — requires immediate mitigation plan

items.label: Major Risk
items.description: Protocol deviations: high impact, low probability — needs contingency planning

items.label: Moderate Risk
items.description: Missing data: low impact, high probability — implement monitoring procedures

items.label: Minor Risk
items.description: Equipment failure: low impact, low probability — standard maintenance sufficient

data.caption: Risk assessment matrix for clinical trial management
